### Jack Kruse — 2018-06-23T15:51:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/660nm-850nm-and-possibly-other-high-power-lights.21471/post-244142>

A monochromatic beam of illumination was used in most of Rife's machines that he used on cancer cells in the early 20th century
This is an older technology that needs to be revisited and understood really well but it wont be until we understand how light works and how changing its color affects frequency changes. Normally when we change the frequency of light it induces flickering because of modulation. In biology this does not happen because we use water, protein, and things inside mitochondria to do this without inducing flicker or frequency modulation effects within the visible spectrum. Rife was an interesting guy to me because he realized on could identify microbes with color and frequencies. This is actually how the immune system works. It uses a light fingerprint to know what to destroy. Consider Rife's ideas........

Is It Better to Shatter or Reinforce? Treating Disease with Frequencies?

I would like to make a comparison of two approaches to treating cancer. The two approaches are of Royal R. Rife and his treatment of cancer through destroying the cancer cell, and Georges Lakhovsky, whose theory was to bring all cells back to their healthy state without destruction of any cells.

Let’s begin with a basic overview of Rife’s original approach. Through observation utilizing his unique Universal Microscope, Rife was able to determine the life frequencies of microbes, bacteria, and viruses that were the cause of approximately 60 diseases and illnesses. The Smithsonian Institution, a federal institution with multiple museums scattered throughout Washington, DC, republished an account of the Rife Universal Microscope in its Annual Report from the Journal of the Franklin Institute, Volume 237, Issue 2, February 1944, Pages 103–130, titled The New Microscopes.

"It should be emphasized that the same organisms refract the same colors when stained by the monochromatic beam of illumination of the Universal Microscope, regardless of the media upon which they are grown." Rife used one frequency of light in combination with another frequency of light, to illuminate a third frequency of light which was the ‘life frequency' within the various organisms.

"The virus of the Bacillus Typhosus is always a turquoise blue, the Bacillus Coli always mahogany colored, the Mycobacterium li prae always a ruby shade, the filter-passing form of a virus of tuberculosis always an emerald green, the virus of cancer always a purplish red, and so on. Thus, with the aid of this microscope, it is possible to reveal the typhoid organism, for instance, in the blood of a suspected typhoid patient four and five days before a Widal is positive."

This paragraph should really open your eyes just how powerful light can be when its application is done properly.

The Journal article states, "Under the Universal Microscope disease organisms such as those of tuberculosis, cancer, sarcoma, streptococcus, typhoid, staphylococcus, leprosy, hoof and mouth disease, and others may be observed to succumb when exposed to certain lethal frequencies peculiar to each individual organism and directed upon them by rays covering a wide range of frequencies \[produced by a frequency generator\]."

Rife’s approach was to shatter the mutated cells and pathogens responsible for a disease. This was accomplished through a device projecting the resonant frequency of a biological organism back toward that organism. Much the same as when a singer’s voice shatters glass. In the early days of Rife's experiments, a difficulty was that as the cancer cells were destroyed, the toxins remained in the body and placed a tremendous strain on the immune system. Eventually, this was corrected through a different treatment protocol.
\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Next, let's look at Georges Lakhovsky's basic philosophy and his approach to treating cancer and other diseases. "Let us suppose a cell vibrates at a certain frequency and a microbe vibrates at a different frequency; the microbe begins to fight the cell through radiation, and sickness is started. If the cell cannot repel the stronger vibrations and if the amplitude of its own vibration is forced to decrease, the microbe gains in amplitude and its vibrations begin to decrease and stop those of the cells, bringing on dangerous sickness or death. If, on the contrary, the living cell is started vibrating with the proper amplitude by inside or outside causes, the oscillatory attack is repulsed. Such is my theory."

Both of these guys had no idea they were studying the same effect. Why? When light hits an aqueous protein light turns into a soliton which is an electromechanical wave that makes a vibration or oscillation.

"The problem is somewhat similar to the situation in which a rescuer finds himself when, coming to help a friend in a dangerous situation, finds himself fighting hand to hand against strong aggressors. The rescuer does not dare to fire his gun, fearing to harm his friend mixed up with the aggressors in the melee. This is what happens with radiation: Microbes and healthy cells are all exposed to radiation, which could be used to destroy the unwanted microbes, but it is difficult to suppress them without harming or killing at the same time the cells which are healthy."

"The remedy, in my opinion, is not to kill the microbes in contact with the healthy cells, but to reinforce the oscillations of the cell either directly by reinforcing the radioactivity of the blood or in producing on the cells a direct action by means of the proper rays. During January 1924, I began to build, according to this theory, and with the purpose of therapeutic applications, an apparatus, which I have called the Radio-Cellulo-Oscillator, or Multiple Wave Oscillator."

"It is my firm belief that the cells vibrating at extremely short wavelengths would find their correct vibration in the Hertzian waves, which have the properties of producing extremely short harmonics. The cell with very weak vibrations, when placed in the field of multiple radiations, finds its own frequency and starts again to oscillate normally through the phenomenon of resonance. The type of vibrations that are produced by the radio waves is harmless."

Lakhovsky discovered the frequency that healthy cells, tissue, and organs oscillate in their optimum condition. When you look at the multiple wave oscillator antennae you will see multiple rings. Each ring is broadcasting different frequencies. The cancerous cell begins a process of establishing a normal cell oscillation and begins returning to a normal, healthy cell.

What he describes here is how an antenna can send and receive information using light waves. I talked about this in QT#14 and how it linked to Tryptophan and methionine.

These explanations are a bit simplistic but hopefully present a picture of the two different approaches these guys used in the 2oth century without fully understanding QED or quantum mechanics. They are describing two sides of the same coin. Neither of them realizes it and very few people who have really reviewed their work understand that those two sides of the coin are the key to understanding how they link to the two self-regulatory programs that control mtDNA. According to cancer researchers, "cancer is a group of diseases involving abnormal cell growth with the potential to invade or spread to other parts of the body." According to virus researchers, "a virus is a small infectious agent that replicates only inside the living cells of other organisms."

We have examined two approaches. One approach is to destroy the cancer cells and the virus. A good analogy would be a singer singing a note that can shatter glass. The other approach is to assist the mutated cell to a healthy operating condition by bolstering its energy, increasing its frequency and returning it to the state of a healthy cell. If the cell's oscillations are normal and strong then the virus cannot replicate inside of it.

I believe in the discoveries of Royal Rife and I also think highly of Lakhovsky and the multiple wave oscillator because they tell us that life can change light into things to self-regulate the cell. Both approaches have been successful, and bespeak of the great potential of energy medicine using light, for helping those with cancer and many other diseases and illnesses. My May webinar of 2018 really lays out the case with a modern understanding of how quantum mechanics works operationally in our colonies of mitochondria.

Mitochondria take in matter in the form of particles, electrons, and protons and make light from them. A monochromatic light within the visible spectrum is what cells use to signal. It is in the ELF-UV and the IRA range. Mitochondrial release monochromatic IRA light. UV and IR light control the only two self-regulatory programs in mitochondria. That is why it works. You can see details in Roeland van Wijk's book. For those of you who don't fully understand this science in the book.......van Wijk is describing how a cell seems to mimic the behavior of a black hole. It takes in matter from food and the environment brought to it and emits a certain type of light radiation. That light radiation provides order inside a cell to deal with the chaos around it.

### JanSz — 2018-06-23T16:26:58+0300

### Jack Kruse — 2018-06-23T17:48:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/660nm-850nm-and-possibly-other-high-power-lights.21471/post-244162>

Magnesium is the center atom in plant chlorophyll and Iron is the center atom in hemoglobin. Both chlorophyll and hemoglobin are porphyrin proteins that absorb all frequencies of UV light. The atom in the center acts to create a new spectrum of light to create a quasiparticle called an exciton. Chlorophyll creates blue-green excitons. Hemoglobin creates purple and red excitons. When light hits these different porphyrin rings the light reaction mechanism is the same but the resultant light frequency varies. The cage around the center atom is responsible for turning solar light into an electrical plasma of excitons. This cage is made from nitrogen atoms to form these different colored versions of an exciton. How do proteins, like chlorophyll and hemoglobin, pictured above, create time for leaves and red blood cells from nothing? The counterintuitive truth is: They use "holes" in semiconductors to create an exciton. An exciton is a particle that doesn't exist for long. Excitons are the "ghost in the machine of life." An exciton can form when a photon is absorbed by clouds of electrons in a semiconductor. Chlorophyll and hemoglobin are biologic semiconductors made of carbon and metal ions. As they absorb rays of the sun wirelessly they create excitons from electrons by exciting them to move. This movement creates topologic changes in use that minimize the flicker effect of light in the solar spectrum. When things move in life, forces are created, and with respect to these quasiparticles, time is held still. Semiconductors science are part of condensed matter physics.

That exciton acts like a quantum dot or qubit and the light information has to be delivered to the reaction center to be used and is not thermalized to heat as it is in most man-made machines. Classic thermodynamics describes these processes but living quantum systems use quantum thermodynamics to complete the job of living. If the light energy was thermalized it would be lost to the environment and could not be used for photosynthesis in leaves or in hemoglobin in each living system. Humans don't use chlorophyll for their version of photosynthesis to make clean energy in our blood plasma to energize it. We use visible light to create the phosphorus atoms in our blood (as quantum dots). This atom comes from the ATP system and its atomic physics to change the physical components in water networks to charge separate water to make hydrogen gas in our blood to augment the physiology of RBCs to become the optimal optical telescope that connect us to our star using purple (UV) and red (LLLT) excitons which then activate things like eumelanin, melanin, carotenoids, and porphyrins in RBC's to capture the solar energy and use it in many unique ways.

In quantum mechanics, there are very unusual phenomena within battery science. Quantum action of qubits can produce massive amounts of energy and INFORMATION. Quibits are subatomic particles of atoms like phosphorus. Why is this important? As particles drop to their lowest energy state, they release energy and information to the system. That energy is usually in the form of light. The information imparts order to the system in an organization of aqueous proteins.

It occurs in a chloroplast reaction center of leaves and inside the matrix of a mitochondrion of animals. If a system can collect that energy, they can make batteries with unbelievable power. These batteries become rechargeable dynamos because of a quirk in quantum mechanics. The more qubits a system contains the faster the battery can charge itself. This ability is what makes chloroplasts and mitochondrion very special batteries. It is also why excitons can operate at high efficiencies because they do not experience time.

This effect is a very similar process to the [Yarkovsky effect](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DQtj0RhimZY) we see in asteroid re-direction that occurs in the cosmos. This effect is usually described in large space of space, but in physics what happens at large scales also can happen at small scales even if we have not designed instruments to measure it.

I think this effect is really why humans lost their skin hair compared to other primates we are related too. Less hair means we can harvest more energy and information to support the brain's metabolism in humans. This effect had long-range issues into how our mitochondria operate. Hair is an antenna on our surface. Removing them and adding apocrine glands makes sense when you are trying to gain more energy and information from the environment.

This effect, I believe, occurs in the mouth of cytochrome proteins (Fe-S cores) where incident light from electrons excited by sunlight has their frequency split to make red light photons in the Q-cycle to affect cytochrome 4, which like hemoglobin, is a heme protein. Since the mouth of cytochromes is a very small world (below 10 Angstroms) I believe Van der Waals forces are likely the main actor in this biologic version of Yarkovsky's effect. This mechanism also affects the spin rate of the ATPase too. This is linked to how much ATP can be made by a cell. Mind you, this all occurs at ridiculously fast rates, while not allowing this light energy to be thermalized or lost, so the cell can do work with that energy instantaneously. Our mitochondrion, however, has the ability to both thermalize this light energy by its use of uncoupling proteins and by altering our mitochondrial haplotypes, SNP's and SAP's. Mitochondrion also can remain more coupled if in the incident solar EMF is in the 250nm-390nm range chronically. Mitochondria seem to specialize in the shortwave range of the solar spectrum. Leaves specialize in higher range photosynthesis. I talked about this in Vermont 2018.

Normally when we change the frequency of light it induces flickering because of modulation. In biology this does not happen because we use water, protein, and things inside mitochondria to do this without inducing flicker or frequency modulation effects within the visible spectrum. Rife was an interesting guy to me because he realized on could identify microbes with color and frequencies. This is actually how the immune system works. It uses a light fingerprint to know what to destroy. Consider Rife's ideas........
>
> Is It Better to Shatter or Reinforce? Treating Disease with Frequencies?
>
> I would like to make a comparison of two approaches to treating cancer. The two approaches are of Royal R. Rife and his treatment of cancer through destroying the cancer cell, and Georges Lakhovsky, whose theory was to bring all cells back to their healthy state without destruction of any cells.
>
> Let’s begin with a basic overview of Rife’s original approach. Through observation utilizing his unique Universal Microscope, Rife was able to determine the life frequencies of microbes, bacteria, and viruses that were the cause of approximately 60 diseases and illnesses. The Smithsonian Institution, a federal institution with multiple museums scattered throughout Washington, DC, republished an account of the Rife Universal Microscope in its Annual Report from the Journal of the Franklin Institute, Volume 237, Issue 2, February 1944, Pages 103–130, titled The New Microscopes.
>
> "It should be emphasized that the same organisms refract the same colors when stained by the monochromatic beam of illumination of the Universal Microscope, regardless of the media upon which they are grown." Rife used one frequency of light in combination with another frequency of light, to illuminate a third frequency of light which was the ‘life frequency' within the various organisms.
>
> "The virus of the Bacillus Typhosus is always a turquoise blue, the Bacillus Coli always mahogany colored, the Mycobacterium li prae always a ruby shade, the filter-passing form of a virus of tuberculosis always an emerald green, the virus of cancer always a purplish red, and so on. Thus, with the aid of this microscope, it is possible to reveal the typhoid organism, for instance, in the blood of a suspected typhoid patient four and five days before a Widal is positive."
>
> This paragraph should really open your eyes just how powerful light can be when its application is done properly.
>
> The Journal article states, "Under the Universal Microscope disease organisms such as those of tuberculosis, cancer, sarcoma, streptococcus, typhoid, staphylococcus, leprosy, hoof and mouth disease, and others may be observed to succumb when exposed to certain lethal frequencies peculiar to each individual organism and directed upon them by rays covering a wide range of frequencies \[produced by a frequency generator\]."
>
> Rife’s approach was to shatter the mutated cells and pathogens responsible for a disease. This was accomplished through a device projecting the resonant frequency of a biological organism back toward that organism. Much the same as when a singer’s voice shatters glass. In the early days of Rife's experiments, a difficulty was that as the cancer cells were destroyed, the toxins remained in the body and placed a tremendous strain on the immune system. Eventually, this was corrected through a different treatment protocol.
> \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
>
> Next, let's look at Georges Lakhovsky's basic philosophy and his approach to treating cancer and other diseases. "Let us suppose a cell vibrates at a certain frequency and a microbe vibrates at a different frequency; the microbe begins to fight the cell through radiation, and sickness is started. If the cell cannot repel the stronger vibrations and if the amplitude of its own vibration is forced to decrease, the microbe gains in amplitude and its vibrations begin to decrease and stop those of the cells, bringing on dangerous sickness or death. If, on the contrary, the living cell is started vibrating with the proper amplitude by inside or outside causes, the oscillatory attack is repulsed. Such is my theory."
>
> Both of these guys had no idea they were studying the same effect. Why? When light hits an aqueous protein light turns into a soliton which is an electromechanical wave that makes a vibration or oscillation.
>
> "The problem is somewhat similar to the situation in which a rescuer finds himself when, coming to help a friend in a dangerous situation, finds himself fighting hand to hand against strong aggressors. The rescuer does not dare to fire his gun, fearing to harm his friend mixed up with the aggressors in the melee. This is what happens with radiation: Microbes and healthy cells are all exposed to radiation, which could be used to destroy the unwanted microbes, but it is difficult to suppress them without harming or killing at the same time the cells which are healthy."
>
> "The remedy, in my opinion, is not to kill the microbes in contact with the healthy cells, but to reinforce the oscillations of the cell either directly by reinforcing the radioactivity of the blood or in producing on the cells a direct action by means of the proper rays. During January 1924, I began to build, according to this theory, and with the purpose of therapeutic applications, an apparatus, which I have called the Radio-Cellulo-Oscillator, or Multiple Wave Oscillator."
>
> "It is my firm belief that the cells vibrating at extremely short wavelengths would find their correct vibration in the Hertzian waves, which have the properties of producing extremely short harmonics. The cell with very weak vibrations, when placed in the field of multiple radiations, finds its own frequency and starts again to oscillate normally through the phenomenon of resonance. The type of vibrations that are produced by the radio waves is harmless."
>
> Lakhovsky discovered the frequency that healthy cells, tissue, and organs oscillate in their optimum condition. When you look at the multiple wave oscillator antennae you will see multiple rings. Each ring is broadcasting different frequencies. The cancerous cell begins a process of establishing a normal cell oscillation and begins returning to a normal, healthy cell.
>
> What he describes here is how an antenna can send and receive information using light waves. I talked about this in QT#14 and how it linked to Tryptophan and methionine.
>
> These explanations are a bit simplistic but hopefully present a picture of the two different approaches these guys used in the 2oth century without fully understanding QED or quantum mechanics. They are describing two sides of the same coin. Neither of them realizes it and very few people who have really reviewed their work understand that those two sides of the coin are the key to understanding how they link to the two self-regulatory programs that control mtDNA. According to cancer researchers, "cancer is a group of diseases involving abnormal cell growth with the potential to invade or spread to other parts of the body." According to virus researchers, "a virus is a small infectious agent that replicates only inside the living cells of other organisms."
>
> We have examined two approaches. One approach is to destroy the cancer cells and the virus. A good analogy would be a singer singing a note that can shatter glass. The other approach is to assist the mutated cell to a healthy operating condition by bolstering its energy, increasing its frequency and returning it to the state of a healthy cell. If the cell's oscillations are normal and strong then the virus cannot replicate inside of it.
>
>
>
>
> I believe in the discoveries of Royal Rife and I also think highly of Lakhovsky and the multiple wave oscillator because they tell us that life can change light into things to self-regulate the cell. Both approaches have been successful, and bespeak of the great potential of energy medicine using light, for helping those with cancer and many other diseases and illnesses. My May webinar of 2018 really lays out the case with a modern understanding of how quantum mechanics works operationally in our colonies of mitochondria.
>
>
>
> Mitochondria take in matter in the form of particles, electrons, and protons and make light from them. A monochromatic light within the visible spectrum is what cells use to signal. It is in the ELF-UV and the IRA range. Mitochondrial release monochromatic IRA light. UV and IR light control the only two self-regulatory programs in mitochondria. That is why it works. You can see details in Roeland van Wijk's book. For those of you who don't fully understand this science in the book.......van Wijk is describing how a cell seems to mimic the behavior of a black hole. It takes in matter from food and the environment brought to it and emits a certain type of light radiation. That light radiation provides order inside a cell to deal with the chaos around it.

When I was in elementary school, I went to a flea market with my brother (has autism) and our dad. One of the vendors noticed my brother's mannerisms and he brought up the term Royal Ramen Rife and mentioned that it helped cure his autism. After we got home, I remember looking it up on wikipedia. Can't believe it's been almost 20 years since I've seen this name.

### Anthony Smith — 2025-04-23T00:50:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/660nm-850nm-and-possibly-other-high-power-lights.21471/post-351116>

I believe the original Rife machine was built with tubes.
When a group of people in more recent years tried to duplicate the Rife machine they used modern electronics not available to Rife, they used transistors to create the frequencies. Their results were very poor.
With tubes - the frequencies put out built as the tube powered up, the frequencies then collapsed as the tubes power down.
With transistors the frequency was on or off. No build up, no collapse.

It was determined that this variation in the frequency, the build and subsequent collapse was an essential part of the process.
I know this because I met the guy who built the circuit to duplicate this frequency variation and the “new” Rife machine stared giving the results hoped for.

I often think of this when hearing conversations about what NIR and/or UV frequency is best. Artificial lights put out static, level frequencies while sunlight/nature is full of variations, complex combined frequencies that also build and collapse. All the individual frequencies from the sun and their harmonics also change throughout the day/year.

Could this be why when it comes to natural light . . . TINA.

### Jenelle — 2018-06-18T14:12:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/glad-to-be-here.21473/post-243658>

[@Gina R](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/21555/) ~ welcome.

A tip I want to share with you, and I hope you'll really think on it:

Pay attention to what Jack says.

Whether it is directly to you, or to someone else. If he isn't talking directly to you about what you want to know, google his name + "iodine" or "leaky gut" or whatever it may be. There will be many search results. Then READ.

Members are well-intentioned, and I am so glad they are here ~ but they are not Jack Kruse. And everything they say does not necessarily line up with his thoughts on your particular issues. So find HIS words. Then decide for yourself.

### caroline — 2018-06-20T02:03:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/glad-to-be-here.21473/post-243831>

honestly Gina - I can't really remember -it was a few years ago. I remember there was quite a few of us.

In particular - Danny Scollan had some serious stuff happen - it took him months to get back on track. Look up his journal.

The whole point is ...our n=1 is only ours ...definitely does not apply to anyone else. Things may work great for others but could potentially screw us up.

To my knowledge Jack has never been on the iodine bandwagon.

Yes ....he did tell a story about when he was a resident and the attending did apply iodine to an older woman's breasts and their was a great result....but that was all in that woman's context and medical history.

I think most of us had pretty heavy detox symptoms ...maybe someone else would remember.

Dr. K. is always very specific when he tells us stuff .....most others here are personal opinions -so you really have to do your own due diligence.

### Joyfun — 2018-06-15T12:06:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/shalom-from-a-grandmother-in-israel-happy-to-be-here-and-forum.21475/post-243440>

I am sorry that I did not follow the protocol for new members when I joined May 7, 2018, because I saw a young lady in the forum from Israel, too, and then followed my bliss all over the forum.
But it has been my good fortune to travel less travelled roads so here I am in Meet and Greet, better late than never.
I will update my signature to reflect the input wanted there and begin My Optimal Journal.

### Phosphene — 2018-06-15T14:16:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/shalom-from-a-grandmother-in-israel-happy-to-be-here-and-forum.21475/post-243447>

You seem like a curious, intelligent and delightful lady. Looking forward to hearing more!

### Joyfun — 2018-06-15T17:19:06+0300

[@Phosphene](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/19648/)
Hi Phosphene,
Thank you for your kind words. As there are no coincidences as your name provided me an answer to an event of this week. I researched the meaning of the name you chose. Our eyes and brains are truly remarkable.
Have you heard of people who can see UV? This is a web site of an artist that sees many more colors than we can because of her ability to see UV.
[https://concettaantico.com/?utm\_source=youtube&utm\_medium=video-description&utm\_campaign=vulpine](https://concettaantico.com/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=video-description&utm_campaign=vulpine)
Expanded vision is such an asset. Do you suppose her dopamine level is high because of her UV sight or what else might it provide her?

### Phosphene — 2018-06-25T22:08:53+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/shalom-from-a-grandmother-in-israel-happy-to-be-here-and-forum.21475/post-244315>

Hi @Joyfun—I didn’t mean to ignore this. I thought I’d come back when I had more time, but I’m easily distracted. All these webinars are now available to me and that’s all I want to do!

She certainly has some vibrant paintings but I’m not sure the colors are all that different than other artists who use strong, unusual colors? Kind of like that artist who somehow got crazy popular with the American masses, who was it—Kinkaide? I’m probably missing the point. Or maybe I can see some UV too so this looks normal to me?

The phosphenes are fascinating. I used to see them only in a dark room, but now I see the colors and patterns just closing my eyes anywhere.

I wonder if she ever used hallucinogens? Some people see colors in whole new ways afterwards. I haven’t gone there yet...

My brain is going around in enough circles already as it is.

Hi Phosphene,
Articles about her say that she sees 99 million more colors than the average human because of a 4th type of cone cell that extends color perception into the UV range. And people say humans can't see UV!!??
Here's an interesting article about her with pictures: [http://munsell.com/color-blog/tetrachromat-artist-concetta-antico/](http://munsell.com/color-blog/tetrachromat-artist-concetta-antico/)
It got me thinking that wouldn't it be interesting if you were a Tetrachromat like Concetta Antico, also.  The article said that female offspring of a Tetrachromat have color blind daughters.  Do you have any daughters?
I googled tetrachromat and ability to see phosphenes, but came up empty. However, absence of evidence does not indicate evidence of absence. It would be nice if a simple test existed to detect this ability.
I need to google Erwan Lecorre now as Caroline seems pretty excited about webinars with him.

### Sue-UK — 2018-06-27T12:10:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/shalom-from-a-grandmother-in-israel-happy-to-be-here-and-forum.21475/post-244397>

> Hi Phosphene,
> Articles about her say that she sees 99 million more colors than the average human because of a 4th type of cone cell that extends color perception into the UV range. And people say humans can't see UV!!??
> Here's an interesting article about her with pictures: [http://munsell.com/color-blog/tetrachromat-artist-concetta-antico/](http://munsell.com/color-blog/tetrachromat-artist-concetta-antico/)
> It got me thinking that wouldn't it be interesting if you were a Tetrachromat like Concetta Antico, also.  The article said that female offspring of a Tetrachromat have color blind daughters.  Do you have any daughters?
> I googled tetrachromat and ability to see phosphenes, but came up empty. However, absence of evidence does not indicate evidence of absence. It would be nice if a simple test existed to detect this ability.
> I need to google Erwan Lecorre now as Caroline seems pretty excited about webinars with him.

A musing ….

I've only ever seen an aura once, it was the speaker at a conference of healers, meditators and dowsers. I think that my own brain waves became more synchronised, more coherent, because of who I was surrounded by. I've never managed to repeat the experience, but I see it as a moment of grace. It sometimes happens unexpectedly, but I can also change my colour perception through a meditation in the sun. The sun is strong at the moment, so when the sun gets above the tree line I know UV is in. If I lean back in the chair, with my feet grounded on the grass, keep my eyes closed and expose my eyelids face and neck to the sun for a few minutes, perhaps massaging my face, particularly round the forehead and facial bones (better with an ice cube...), then stand up, turn my back to the sun, and perhaps give my scalp above my visual cortex region a massage, then stop and slowly open my eyes. The sun is behind me and I can look at the trees and sky in front, and there's almost an ethereal glow. If I look down at the black cat, his coat seems to shimmer differently.

Perhaps her art doesn't necessarily reflect tetrachromacy or be something unique. Perhaps she's not portraying the world as it is, but as she is …

If you want to see your own aura, be on your grounding mat in the early morning when the cones are still "sleeping", but the rods can detect the low light. Just put your hand about one foot away from your face. Be ready for a light show. You will see little spikey lights that bristles around your fingers maybe .5 cm long. It will look like a cactus. You might even see tiny lights fly off. This is the physical level of auras. I knew my earthing pad was delivering electrons as I had not seen my hand look so alive before using it about 7 years ago. Unfortunately, people in the United States may have a problem plugging their grounding mat into the grounding hole as it most likely leads to dirty electricity off the grid.

That may have been similar to your moment of grace to have seen an aura in a roomful of healers, meditators and dowsers. They are all plugged into the same source.

Ugg! that's right. Condemning our daughter to color blindness does not seem like good evolvement.
O, yes, the pictures of Alex Grey are beautiful and put me in chills. I have seen this before, but did not know who the artist was. I once heard that if people had UV vision, they could see through walls. I have also heard that there are people who actually see the inside of the body and see the problems. When I was learning to take x-rays, I wished I could see inside to get the equipment in the right place. Real anatomy of people does not match the drawings inside the books. Parts can be all over the place and hearts on the right side instead of the left.
I had to disable the f.lux to see the colors of his paintings. It is set at 2100K now, nice and orangey.

[](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/alex-grey-art-tattoo-ely-tattoo-alex-grey-art-modern-tattooing-tools-jpg.8113/) This is going to be a big ouchy in 5G.

### Sue-UK — 2018-06-28T11:24:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/shalom-from-a-grandmother-in-israel-happy-to-be-here-and-forum.21475/post-244486>

> [Joyfun said:](/goto/post?id=244482)
>
> [@Sue-UK](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/9658/)
>
> I have also heard that there are people who actually see the inside of the body and see the problems.

Woo territory alert  I won't have a rant about my experiences of people in action who think they can see inside me.

I have my doubts that anyone can actually see inside the body, but perhaps its more that if two bioenergetic fields are interacting, and by the viewer applying intention, the bioenergetic field brings back information that his or her brain interprets as a picture. Perhaps "imagine" becomes more of an "image in" (an internally generated simulation). A bit like a dowser's intuition progressing to not needing a pendulum. They might get an image or just "know." At the conference I had the experience of "knowing" that someone behind me was scanning my energy field, I turned round and saw a woman looking at me, and using a pendulum …It was more of a 2 bioenergetic systems interacting phenomena.

If she'd wanted to know something about me, she should have come up and asked me, and I had a choice as to whether to answer the question or not. But giving permission is still a risk. I think its so easy for someone to assume that the viewer/dowser (or however they get their information) is somehow "gifted" and take it for granted they know what they are talking about. Sometimes they can see what they expect to see, and their "advice" is based on what they know, when what they don't know might be more important …. And if appearances are deceptive and their bioenergetic field is worse than mine, I'm the one giving them an electron and biophoton free lunch.

> [Joyfun said:](/goto/post?id=244482)
>
> [@Sue-UK](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/9658/)
>
> I once heard that if people had UV vision, they could see through walls.

I've wondered if before the electric light bulb everyone could use their own UV photons emitted through the eyes to see more in dim light. I can see how it would make survival sense. It reminds me of "Use it or lose it, but don't wear it out. " Tetrachomacy with effects on a daughter could be a case of wearing it out … ?

> If she'd wanted to know something about me, she should have come up and asked me, and I had a choice as to whether to answer the question or not. But giving permission is still a risk. I think its so easy for someone to assume that the viewer/dowser (or however they get their information) is somehow "gifted" and take it for granted they know what they are talking about. Sometimes they can see what they expect to see, and their "advice" is based on what they know, when what they don't know might be more important …. And if appearances are deceptive and their bioenergetic field is worse than mine, I'm the one giving them an electron and biophoton free lunch.
>
>
>
> I've wondered if before the electric light bulb everyone could use their own UV photons emitted through the eyes to see more in dim light. I can see how it would make survival sense. It reminds me of "Use it or lose it, but don't wear it out. " Tetrachomacy with effects on a daughter could be a case of wearing it out … ?

This is a hard one. The mother gets all the eye candy and the daughter gets the wrappers.

Hi Sue-UK,
I like your thoughts on how a person might "see" inside another's body. There is lots to chew on here. I like the quote of Einstein:

Who's to say that a person with the ability of seeing into another's body is perceiving at that vibrational level of the physical. We are such powerful beings who have forgotten what we are. Some things are not of the level of proof, but are confirmable and experiential. Just like you knew someone was behind you scanning your energy field and to turn around and see her with the "evidence" in her hand. That knowing is not necessarily "provable" but it sure was experiential.


══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Thread: Grandma Joyfun's Optimal Journal 2018
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grandma-joyfuns-optimal-journal-2018.21476/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 17
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Joyfun — 2018-06-15T13:35:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grandma-joyfuns-optimal-journal-2018.21476/post-243443>

My optimal life actually began when I discovered Dr. Kruse in March 2016. That's when my Health WINS began and actually continues since I joined JackKruse.com May 7, 2018.
I am 74.
Height: 5" 4"
Weight: 58.9 kg (129.8 lbs) in April 2017, down to 54.4 kg (119.49 lbs) July 23, 2017
Present weight: 116.4 lbs I have not cut down on food, but eat more than 2 years ago because I do not want to lose more weight.
I was not trying to lose weight. It happened of its own when I finally realized I needed to have my feet grounded at the same time I ate my breakfast or lunch in the full sun.
At first I sat bare footed in the public courtyard of our apartments. Now, all my shoes are grounded.
The skin on my face is very good with very little wrinkles. One lady in my study group thought I was 30 years younger than I am, (what a sweetheart!) I also have used red light therapy for about 7 years before I discovered the healing power of the sun.
When I came to Israel in 2013, it was from a nnEMF hell hole at my daughter's house in Colorado. There were 3 computers and cell phones without f.flux or blue blocking screens, mobile phone, compact spiral lights all over the house except my bedroom and bathroom which I installed full spectrum bulbs in 2010 (some consolation, not, as I was not just in my room).
The summer of 2014 when we had the bomb sirens in Jerusalem, I woke up with shingles down the left side of my spine. I thought I was bit by bugs. I used my red LED light (660nm) on it daily with results in 30 days. I read that shingles gives warning signals long before the skin eruptions.
In 2015, recurring pain in legs and butt from sciatica occurred. I only knew to use my red LED at the time and my earthing pad I discovered about 2011.
Since 2010, I knew the value of drinking water without fluoride and ordered a Berkey filter with additional fluoride filters. So, I have been drinking water with no fluoride since 2010.
I basically had the water and magnetism correct, but did not know about the sun aspect to the equation.
I only wore sunglasses for a couple of months in Israel. Before that time I rarely, if ever, wore sunglasses as I did not have a need for them. I only wore my glasses for driving. And since 2013, there was never a need to wear any glasses.
Also, I have not worn makeup or nail polish since I was about 30.
Got to run now to make my lunch and be outside for 30 minutes, grounded, enjoying the sun, delicious food, and life.

### Joyfun — 2018-06-18T15:50:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grandma-joyfuns-optimal-journal-2018.21476/post-243670>

I began watching the sunsets June 8. I am outside in the parking area behind the apartments. Nothing matters to me at this time of day, 6:30pm to 7pm, just the sun and me. I see how easy it is to do, but it took me a couple of years to start. I do meditation before going outside and the whole experience is a peaceful way to close down the day. It took several days, but it added another hour to my sleeping time even though I am awake at 5am. So, this makes it 5 times that I schedule to be out in the sun, not counting the other daily activities when I am outside walking to them.
I was watching the Nick Pineault interview today, [https://www.youtube.com/watch?time\_continue=14&v=k-kt3\_oQ8ns](https://www.youtube.com/watch?time_continue=14&v=k-kt3_oQ8ns)
and hope it is still OK to wear my grounding shoes in my little town as most likely there are no metal pipes under the sidewalks or streets. Electric lines are on poles. Maybe It is OK as there is no 5G.

### Joyfun — 2018-06-19T12:37:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grandma-joyfuns-optimal-journal-2018.21476/post-243744>

I'm in the process of watching

I started washing my face in un-fluoridated water about a week ago, and thought it would be a good idea to only use un-fluoridated water when I brush my teeth instead of sink water.
It seemed like a good idea to tan the inside of my arms with palms up in the sun. What is nature's purpose of not letting the palms and the palm side of fingers to tan; also same for bottom of feet? Could it have something to do with the healing ability of the hands as healers use them?

### Joyfun — 2018-07-04T08:57:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grandma-joyfuns-optimal-journal-2018.21476/post-244937>

Being outside from 6:30pm to 7pm has been a good time to wind down the day. Yesterday, I held my palms up on my lap to get the light from setting sun. I can feel the energy in my palms. The sun really sets much later, but the area is too low with high buildings in the distance which blocks the view.
For more than a week, I have been pondering the effects of light on palms and bottom of feet. For a day or two, I have been putting my palms up to the sun. This morning at 7:15am with palms up on my lap, it came to me to put my hands up in front of me facing the sun in the shape of a triangle with the sun in the middle.
{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. The outcome was unexpected as I could look at the sun directly which was a small white circle surrounded by translucent red. Moving the palms to different distances provided a clear image.
Maybe tomorrow, I'll try making a circle with my palms and look through that.

### Marko Pollo — 2018-07-04T18:09:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grandma-joyfuns-optimal-journal-2018.21476/post-244960>

Good morning! I have been contemplating hands, feet, and all other places the sun don’t shine. I think to optimize our potential as collectors of solar energy, we need to expose all parts of our skin and thus sub q cells and organs to penetrating full spectrum light.
I have been watching animals throughout the day and it appears that they all get sun to their entire bodies every day. In watching sheep, it is obvious that when they turn away from the sun, they are aiming junk directly at the sun. At the same time, they get reflective sunlight on the bottom shady part of their bodies. They will often select shade in noon day sun.
In plants, because they cannot move, they must endure this intense light. The plant is operating beyond its full photosynthetic capacity, especially the upper canopy of leaves. I think most plants do better with some mid day summer shade as long as they are getting morning and afternoon sun.
So anyway, to optimize absorption of the sun’s quantum goodness, I have moved my gravity board from its dark corner to a place where I can orient it towards the sun, even when it is cloudy. It feels great to me!
As a new mitocondriac coming with a history of modesty and misinformation about sun exposure, I am grateful to be shining those glorious rays on all that was kept in the darkness. I am also super grateful that I found Dr Kruse and all you like minded truth seekers! And so glad the legs of the stool are all easy and enjoyable: hydration, sleep, and sun.

### Joyfun — 2018-07-13T07:30:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grandma-joyfuns-optimal-journal-2018.21476/post-245788>

I don't know if I like my new weight or not. This morning my precise scale read 115.8 lbs. I am not trying to lose weight and make sure I get enough to eat as I do not like being hungry. My scale usually says ll6.4 or 117.2 lbs. Actually, I think it says what it wants. I never wanted to be a skinny old lady, but actually, whatever I am doing I am grateful that with all the sun I get, my skin is not like a wrinkled prune and I look OK.
I dumped 1/2 of the clothes in my closet and kept all the white clothes about a week ago. They look very nice next to my tanned skin and white hair. No older ladies in my little town dare to dress like me.
Actually, I am surprised that most ladies, babies, and children here look so white and pasty.

How did the red light help you and what earthing pad did you use?

### Joyfun — 2018-08-03T14:14:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grandma-joyfuns-optimal-journal-2018.21476/post-247361>

[@m. Ann Chapman](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/21033/)
Hi Ann,
The first time I used the red LED light maybe 7 years ago, the sciatic pain stopped in a week, came back a month later for a couple of days so I used the red LED light, again. It happened a 3rd time about a month later, but this time it was gone until I had pain in 2014 or so. But that is before I discovered Dr. Kruse and learned about light, water, and magnetism. I am OK now.
I use a $6 red LED grow light from Aliexpress. I never used IR LED. Here is the site on Aliexpress: [https://www.aliexpress.com/item/2W-...535.html?spm=a2g0s.9042311.0.0.25ad4c4dGDpTPK](https://www.aliexpress.com/item/2W-5W-7W-E27-Red-Blue-5-1-LEDs-Grow-Light-for-Flowering-Plant-and-Hydroponics/32373317535.html?spm=a2g0s.9042311.0.0.25ad4c4dGDpTPK)
I use the 7 watt size. It does have a few blue LED lights in it.
I can not recommend an earthing pad for you if you live in the states or any country where the grounding hole is connected to the grid. Here in Israel, the grounding hole is connected to the ground outside by a wire not to any grid.
Is your magnetico sleep pad under your mattress or on top of your mattress? Does it belong on the top of the mattress? I used to sleep on a magnetic pad on top of my mattress in the middle 1990's.
You say for the past 6 years you slept on the magnetico sleep pad, but were you also doing what Dr. Kruse teaches during those past 6 years and saw no improvement?
It's a 3 legged stool, not a one legged stool.

Thanks for the feedback! The magnetic pad is for underneath the cooling mattress of 14 inches, I’m always up early and love to be outside, unfortunately not as much as I would like. I leave for work around 5:30 am, take a 15 min break between 7:30 and 9 to get morning sun and a break from a windowless room. Durning the day I’ll take two more sun and air breaks, follow up with the late afternoon sun. As for going barefoot; have always loved walking in the grass barefooted since I was a kid living in FL, so no issues there. Started using a Berkey in Jan 2016 and use it for everything now except brushing teeth. DH has a G8 Red LED, so I’ll implement this activity also. I’ll start for 15 minutes a day and build up to 30. Not sure what your time period was; please elaborate.

### Joyfun — 2018-08-05T12:30:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grandma-joyfuns-optimal-journal-2018.21476/post-247523>

I leave for work around 5:30 am, take a 15 min break between 7:30 and 9 to get morning sun and a break from a windowless room. As for going barefoot; have always loved walking in the grass barefooted since I was a kid living in FL, so no issues there. Started using a Berkey in Jan 2016 and use it for everything now except brushing teeth. DH has a G8 Red LED, so I’ll implement this activity also. I’ll start for 15 minutes a day and build up to 30. Not sure what your time period was; please elaborate.

Hi Ann,
In your work space, is it lit from overhead florescent bulbs or just as worse compact spiral or white LED bulbs. If so, get them removed and buy yourself a lamp that can hold 60 watt incandescent bulbs. Use enough to give you the light you need.
As for the Magnetico, you will need more information from Dr. Kruse or someone who actually knows if that will be OK when 5G comes to your neighborhood.
I looked for the G8 Red LED bulb you use, but is it possible to send a picture of it that you find online? It needs to have the actual bulbs and not flat chips for healing. What is the Watts of the bulb you use. My 7 Watt bulb heals fine. I only need to have it shine over any spot about 2 to 3 minutes. My bulb does not get hot, so I can have it directly on the skin or 3 to 4 inches away for larger coverage. You can hold yours about 1 inch away from the skin if the bulb is hot. You might get the results you need with 2 minutes per spot. However, use your instincts for the time you need.
I read somewhere that the cells will take in only the light they need, but that might be old information. I also read that using the red LED light therapy longer than needed each session is OK. Using Cold Laser Therapy too long on a spot can make the spot worse. That is why I stopped using my Cold Laser device.
Do you have the white fluoride filters on your Berkey as well as the 2 black filters? If not, you better order 2 fluoride filters. I started using the fluoride free Berkey water for brushing my teeth about a month ago. That only took me 75 years to figure out! Why would you want fluoride in your mouth?
During your breaks at work, be sure to take at least one shoe off to be grounded at the same time you are in the sun. At least you are in the sun early enough to set your eye clock as it only takes about 3 or 4 minutes to set.

Good morning Joyfun,

The G8 Red LED is a 90 watt flowering booster from Amazon and appears to be round clear lights. [](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/upload_2018-8-5_9-40-46-jpeg.8510/) .
Good to know less is more when using.

As for Berkey, yes to all filters. I was a skeptic at first that you could differentiate in tastes, but I learned quickly. Love the taste and smell. No more chemicals. Purchased a smaller one for a colleague over a year ago that had to breast feed for other medical reasons. She used this water for the whole family. Best baby gift ever!

No way, will the company remove the fluorescent lights, but I have them all off in my office except for two. The worse part is my home. I have Led’s all in the kitchen which I used to have on all the time, as I love light of any kind. However, for the past I have not turned them on in the evening like I used too. In the process of selling home and they will have to stay.

On the magnetico, interesting referencing G5 and will need to research for future.

Thanks again for all your inputs.
Ann

### Joyfun — 2019-03-22T14:52:05+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grandma-joyfuns-optimal-journal-2018.21476/post-266203>

I never went away, but it has been a long time since I added to my journal. I want you to know that I am standing in a full Kiniki outfit suitable for the dress code in my little town. Under the lace top and lace skirt, I am wearing a Kiniki top made from a wrap and a Kiniki skirt made from 2 wraps. Intuition says I am getting 70% of the sun's rays. The underpants are lace bikini and a cute lace bra. Not bad for an almost 76 year young fun loving lady. I am out later in the afternoon these days as the sun is setting later. I get 6 to 7 hours of sleep. Much better than the 4 or 5 hours several years ago. I am 5'4" and weigh 114 lbs.
It's so sad to read some of the entries where people are so sick. At least something powerful lead them to the right place.
My blessings and joy to all of you wonderful souls.

# Thread: Journal. First sharing current issue & seeking input on next step - antibiotics?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/journal-first-sharing-current-issue-seeking-input-on-next-step-antibiotics.21477/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 27
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Gina R — 2018-06-15T20:29:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/journal-first-sharing-current-issue-seeking-input-on-next-step-antibiotics.21477/post-243469>

Hi and thanks in advance for reading!

(Posted Journal July 10th, 2018. Updated again 9/26/2018.

I'm not sure how to start this but I'm going to upload my recent GI Effects stool test labs and NutrEval Plasma as that's what I'm currently trying to navigate my next step regarding those results. I am a NTP and although I know a bit and have navigated quite a bit on my health journey, I am beyond my scope with what to next. I had reached out to another functional practitioner and I have their recs but I'm curious about another opinion before I start antibiotics which is what they suggested...

**Basic Info:
**
37 yo female, will be 38 in october, single, business owner, NTP
history of "Ulcerative Colitis" Diagnosis and conventional meds (prednisone, 6MP, asacol, colozal), including almost 5ys of Remicade from age 19 to age 30. Got off all rx "UC meds" 2011, flared 2013 and did DIY FMTs which turned my flare completely around) and since then no "classic UC symptoms".
Lived in Maryland between DC and Baltimore all my life. End of July/Early August, temporarily relocating (literally packing my car and going) to Austin, TX but will also be in Hondo, TX for half the time. **\*\*\*UPDATE 9/26/2018 - I RELOCATED TO AUSTIN MID AUGUST, TRADED IN MY PRIUS PRIOR TO ROAD TRIP FOR 2008 RAV4 NO WHISTLES, NO BT. I SPEND AS MUCH TIME AS I CAN AT RANCH. NO CHANGE WITH BEING AT RANCH CONSISTENTLY FOR ABOUT 2ish WEEKS.\*\*\***

K2a haplotype

**Top current health concerns:**

-   **"neuro/cognitive episodes" (paired with fatigue)** that started late April 2018 after a flight to Austin, TX and then after May 2 following a flight back home to Baltimore, MD. The best way to describe it when it's happening, it feels like the onset of a mushroom trip --- visual disturbances (less peripheral vision, and extreme fixation/notice on certain details), brainfog, poor memory, poor concentration, poor focus, finger touch/sensation is off, feel "clumsy" with walking, bumping into things, basically feeling like the onset of magic mushrooms... When it's really bad, I don't feel like I can drive and when I am so out of it, I don't leave the house. Some background about mushroom use, I had been micro-dosing for about 8 months plus taking 1.5-1.75 grams once/month or once every couple months. HOWEVER, during my trip in Austin in April 2018, I took 1.75 grams twice in a 4-day time span. But, the first ever episode happened the day I landed and BEFORE I took any mushrooms in those 2 times. So, I'm not sure if there's any cause/effect relationship there....These episodes last varying lengths --- first one in Austin lasted 3 days, next one in Maryland lasted 2.5 weeks, then 9 days of feeling 80% normal, then next one in Maryland lasted 2 weeks. When I'm "in an episode", it's constant. Out of a scale of 0-5 intensity, it can be .5/1 out of 5 up to 4 out of 5. **\*\*\*UPDATE 9/26/2018, STILL PERSISTING. THE SAME. I'VE BEEN OUT AT A RANCH 2 HOURS FROM AUSTIN AND WAS HOPING THIS ENVIRONMENT WOULD BE HELPFUL, SO FAR, NO IMPROVEMENTS.\*\*\***

-   **abdominal distention/bloat** for about 2 years now. On and off but last 8 months or so, consistently distended no matter what I eat. Previously tried low-fodmap and I thought I had some relief but that didn't last more than 4 months or so. Prior practitioner suspected SIBO, said test was negative Spring 2017. There's more history here but trying to keep to most relevant. Currently very distended and stools are Bristol 6-7 with other daily GI distress. **\*\*\*UPDATE 9/26/2018, STILL PERSISTING THE SAME\*\*\***

-   **"fungal" issues toes/toenails** that has been going on for almost 10 years but increasing in severity last year or so, affecting all toenails except one. Previously, lots of oozing sores on the toes, between toes. Toes are sometimes red/purple if cold or really hot. Nails were turning all yellow, thick, discolored. However, as of July, there is evidence of re-growth of normal toenail. All but my right big toe are almost 85% normal and regrown. (In late April/early May, I cut out all fermented foods & kombucha and was applying iodine topically. **\*\*\*UPDATE 9/26/2018 - TOES AND TOENAILS ARE "NORMAL". I HAVEN'T SEEN THEM THIS NORMAL SINCE 2004-ish. THIS IS GOOD NEWS. NEW NAILS STARTED GROWING OUT AFTER I CUT OUT ALL FERMENTS AND APPLIED SOME IODINE.\*\*\***

-   **missed menstrual cycles**. I was regular for about 5 years until April 2017 after I traveled to the Middle East and didn't get my period there which I should have. Since April 2017 to July 2018, I've only had 6 periods. Last cycle was March 2018. **\*\*\*UPDATE 9/26/2018 - I MISSED APRIL, MAY, JUNE & JULY. I GOT A PERIOD IN AUGUST AND SEPTEMBER 2018  \*\*\***

-   facial puffiness/body composition puffiness. I realize this will normalize when I feel better in other ways.

**Daily priorities:**

-   Morning sunlight 30-60 minutes and I go out even in overcast + mid-day sun when it's out (most times in bathing suit) and evening walk to sun-gaze sunset or after sunset. I need to be better at doing this in the winter here in Maryland but I do this now consistently and I also will be temporarily relocating to Texas anyways so i won't have to worry about lack of sun in the winter. Red light at night, redjuvenator, wear blue blockers after sun-down and anti-glare glasses when in artificial light during the day, acupressure mat 3-4x/week, epsom salt baths 1-2x/week. I wake on my own about 6am. Acupuncture about 1/week.
-   I haven't done any form of exercise since mid April 2018 before my trip to Austin.
-   RO water + liquid minerals added.
-   Currently taking naps almost daily.
-   "Paleo" diet + egg yolks, white rice, ghee. Was eating some forms of organic corn but stopped when recent LRA revealed strong reaction. (The first food template I did was GAPS, then Paleo, then AIP for about a year and recently swung back out into "paleo".) Working on keeping complex carbs higher than in years past but still keeping fat high. Also working on increasing seafood.
-   Working on decreasing nnEMF by decreasing amount of time WIFI is on in house (can't do anything about the smart meter in my rental). Also, seeing if I can trade in my prius with an equal $ swap for a non electric vehicle.
-   **\*\*\*UPDATE 9/26/2018 - TRADED IN PRIUS FOR 2008 RAV4 NO WHISTLES, NO BT, GOT GROUNDING STRAP.\*\*\***
-   **\*\*\*UPDATE 9/26/2018 - STARTED CT VIA FREEZER COLD PLUNGES. HAVE DONE 3 @ 60 degrees from 6-15 minutes so far. Working my way down in temp.\*\*\***

Did a niacin challenge test and no effect with 50mg of niacin on empty stomach. Tested that 2x in one day and then 2x another day.

**Current dilemma with next step bc of a couple conflicting opinions:**

-   Bc of GI effects results, bc of overgrowth of ecoli and a few others overgrowth, extremely high SIGA see results link below), functional practitioner/DOM/biohacker suggests 2 weeks of oral tetracycline then 10 days fluconozale. Taking a particular probiotic orally, via vagina, via suppository and up nose while taking the tetracyline and fluconozale. Continuing with the probiotic for 6 months afterwards. Also to get into sun as much as possible which I am doing.
-   Current acupuncturist who is also DOM suggest herbal formula to combat the overgrowth and not to do the rx antibiotics...would take 6+ months for full affect. As of July 2nd, I started the herbs per her protocol of how to increase each day. As of July 10th, no noticeable benefit. **\*\*\*UPDATE 9/26/2018 - STOPPED THE HERBS MID AUGUST.\*\*\***

**Questions:**

-   Do antibiotics + anti-fungal course? And if not, what is a better option to tackle the GI issues and these neuro/cognitive episodes + fatigue? Obviously, in addition to continuation of my sun and light time and also reducing nnEMF burden...
-   Supplement with PQQ for neuro support?
-   Supplement with algae DHA? I've learned that all animal seafood have heavy duty amount of EPA and little bit of DHA...All, except oysters. Per my NutrEval results (see link below), I have so much EPA that it does not fit on the chart. I have a lots of DHA (but it is within chart).

**
Other relevant things to share:**

I don't have many supportive relationships here/community, so my temporary relocation to Austin is to explore some professional and personal growth. Winters here in Maryland also don't work for me, so I need to be somewhere year-round with good sun along with lots of like-minded people/community. My optimal health seeking also radiates out to hoping to be able to have a child at some point. Lots of financial issues, current lease is ending and also a reason of going out to Austin to stay with a friend for free, to regain some footing with finances.

I could go on and I'm glad to share any more information. I hope Jack may see this and be able to put in some input about my current dilemma with next step?

Thanks in advance and for everything you all do.

### JanSz — 2018-06-21T17:37:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/journal-first-sharing-current-issue-seeking-input-on-next-step-antibiotics.21477/post-243975>

I think that one of the questions you should ask [@Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) at your consultation is about your consumption of a seafood.
Possibly make distinction between general seafood and oysters.
Generally,
most everybody is advised to eat a lots of seafood with emphasis on oysters.
Seafood is taught of predominately as a source of DHA (Docosahexanoic acid).
You have a lots of DHA but the test you did does not define maximum.
OTOH you are deficient in AA (Arachidonic acid).
It is known that Omega3 when in excess, strongly suppress Omega6.

Your particular test (NutrEval)
gives us example about how deceiving is use of indexes.
There are some other laboratories that deal exclusively with indexes.

.....
So far I have not figured out good answer to the question above,
and for my self I make an effort to compose my daily diet with eye on results from my latest fatty acids analysis.
I do check my fatty acids for the last 10+ years, as often as I am able to arrange, but it is not easy subject.

..............

# Thread: Xavier Rodriguez Optimal Jornal
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/xavier-rodriguez-optimal-jornal.21478/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 7
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Xavier Rodriguez — 2018-06-16T03:42:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/xavier-rodriguez-optimal-jornal.21478/post-243496>

The Diet before learning about jack Kruse used to achieve the first set of lab results (2/18/2016) were six days of low carb followed by, one day of eating-whatever I wanted for 3 weeks(carbnite).On low carb days approximately 1800 calories were consumed and on refeed day approx 3000 calories were consumed ( about a whole pizza with soft drink). To achieve the more recent lab results I did a straight ketogenic diet for four weeks with no refeeds no quantum biology was implemented I also reduced dairy intake by 50 percent. So in the second set of labs, only about 25 percent of calories were coming from dairy( organic heavy cream and cheese) total calorie intake approximating 1200 calories. Main sources of fats are organic sugar-free peanut butter, heavy cream, avocados, butter, and coconut oil. Protein is kept between 60-80 grams per day. As far as what I eat here is a list vegetables that I eat. Cabbage, broccoli, Brussel sprouts, kale, watercress, spinach, cauliflower. Protein sources grass-fed beef, organic chicken, organic eggs, unflavored whey protein isolate. Oils I stayed away from corn oil, vegetable oil, canola oil, soybean oil, cottonseed oil, Palm oil. Since I am heterozygous for the MTHFR gene, I supplemented with methyl folate. During both diets sunlight was avoided and blue light was not avoided. I also would bake myself in front of a 50 inch TV that served as a secondary monitor while only wearing a pair of shorts as I studied for tests. Blue light to the max.

Based on my lab results I can say the carbnite protocol and a strict ketogenic diet protocol have failed me. Food alone is not enough. I am looking forward to getting my next set of labs done however tests will be bare minimum as the insurance will not be covering the labs as previously shown. { "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

### Xavier Rodriguez — 2018-06-16T03:48:24+0300

Things that I currently do
Get 15 min AM sunrise light ( no contacts or glasses)
Get minimum 15 min of solar noon light ( no contacts or glasses), but usually get an hour to 3 hours of sun.
eat as much seafood as I can such as fish and especially oysters.
Eat foods that contain sulfur such as garlic in combination with black pepper, and turmeric
block blue light at night
drink fluoride free water with lime or lemon
Kill the power and wifi at night when I go to sleep

Avoid any kind of polyunsaturated fats for cooking, and instead use saturated and monounsaturated fats such as coconut oil and avocado oil, and grass fed beef tallow and butter.

### Xavier Rodriguez — 2018-10-01T03:09:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/xavier-rodriguez-optimal-jornal.21478/post-252037>

Hey Jack and Caroline, thank you both **for the quick response**! I watched the video the day after you posted it to my optimal journal. In order to not waste both of yours time I try to post only when absolutely necessary. Here is where I currently am. I will be posting labs in a few days

Jack I hope you did not find any issues with my patreon post and thank you for answering the questions. I figured it would be a good idea to add the post to my optimal journal.

I started implementing your ideas in January, and now I have to be careful with how much caffeine I consume. A month ago I drank 4 cups of coffee, and it made me feel horrible( I also ended up peeing out 4 pounds of water weight), I used to do this all the time with coffee last year with no ill effect, and it would make me feel good. On the upside, now, I wake up feeling great and refreshed, so I don't need the caffeine. It is also interesting that when I started playing around with nicotine gum ( in Feb 2018), it made me feel so much better, it gave me hope for things, it was really something for me. But now nicotine does very little if anything at all. People were worried that I would get addicted to it since I have never smoked, but no such thing happened. I take a piece of 4mg gum about once a week now to see the effect, The effect is very minimal and is slightly more negative than positive so I don't take it when I have important things to do. I am glad that I took full advantage of this summer( El paso TX 31.7619° N Haplotype A2), I was getting 2 hours of A.M. sunlight starting from the sunrise and a minimum of 1-3 hours of solar noon. Thank you so much for this information. It has helped my mom and me out tremendously. One of the most surprising effects is that I can now eat a ketogenic diet and I do not get depressed as I used to, and I HAVE NO CRAVINGS FOR CARBS. I noticed this at the end of the summer (only took 8 months implementation of your ideas). This effect has never happened, and I have been doing ketogenic-diets on and off since 2015. I am very excited to see where I will be a year from now.

# Thread: FINDING AN ANTENNA IN A HAYSTACK I.E. CAR
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/finding-an-antenna-in-a-haystack-i-e-car.21479/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### ObstreperousPolarBear — 2018-06-16T04:01:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/finding-an-antenna-in-a-haystack-i-e-car.21479/post-243500>

I have a Jeep Wrangler, 2017. It is awesome and I love it because I can put the top back and enjoy the sun. But there is something in the jeep that is transmitting RFs in a pulsatile fashion.

I HAVE HAD THE DASH RIPPED OUT AND THE RADIO AND SATELLITE RADIO UNPLUGGED. No difference. I HAD THEM FOLLOW THE WIRING FOR THE ANTENNA ALL THE WAY BACK INTO THE ROLL BAR. No difference.

I am not sure what on earth to do next. I wish I had a directional RF meter, so that I could find the antenna that is functioning in the jeep.

I'm frustrated by how hard it is to find this antenna and get it out. The irony is that Jeeps are the most customizable cars on the planet - there has to be a way to deactivate the RF coming from my vehicle.

Where do I go next?

Thanks for the help in advance.

### Billybats — 2018-06-16T13:38:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/finding-an-antenna-in-a-haystack-i-e-car.21479/post-243510>

Hi Leland,

This may help:

[http://www.jeepforum.com/forum/f96/where-sirius-antenna-located-819792/#/topics/819792?page=1](http://www.jeepforum.com/forum/f96/where-sirius-antenna-located-819792/#/topics/819792?page=1)

### OptimalSkr — 2018-06-16T14:41:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/finding-an-antenna-in-a-haystack-i-e-car.21479/post-243515>

Just curious how did you have this type of work done? And what was the cost?

### ObstreperousPolarBear — 2018-06-18T02:49:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/finding-an-antenna-in-a-haystack-i-e-car.21479/post-243643>

> [OptimalSkr said:](/goto/post?id=243515)
>
> Just curious how did you have this type of work done? And what was the cost?

Jeep wranglers are unique among cars because they're extremely customizable. The base model has hardly any frills. The idea is that people customize their jeeps and I had no idea how much they put into it! The cool thing about that is that it's easy to take the car apart and put it back together. There are a TON of shops that specialize in just jeeps and customizing them. The dealers are no help at all - they're too busy to even return my messages saying I need an appointment. So I just looked up the local jeep shop and, since they didn't get the problem, they didn't even charge me for it. I'll be headed back there to finally get the job done.

UPDATE I used my meter (which isn't directional, unfortunately) to narrow in on the antenna, and I think I found it under the dash. When we pull it apart again and get the sucker, I will post an update.

Things I learned: You can't just unplug the antenna's connection to its device (GPS, radio, etc), you have to be sure to unplug the power supply. I didn't think of that initially, but now I know.
